title: Canvas print quality: what actually matters before you order
description: Canvas prints in Greece: sizing, sharpness, color, preview before printing, delivery across Greece, and realistic turnaround.
bodyHtml:
A canvas print is a popular way to make art feel “real” in a room. The canvas texture softens digital edges and interacts with light. For sizing and placement, read wall art ordering and artistic portrait guidance.

Sharpness rules

Printing magnifies softness. Choose the sharpest photo with readable eye detail. For ordering context, see portrait from a photo in Athens.

CTA

Start on ArtCanvas.gr and confirm the preview before printing.

faqs.question: Do I need a frame?
faqs.answer: Depends on product; gallery-wrapped edges are common.

faqs.question: How to pick a size?
faqs.answer: Measure the wall and viewing distance.

faqs.question: Printing time?
faqs.answer: Depends on queue; ask for deadlines.

internalLinks.label: Portrait from a photo in Athens
